titleStmt.title: SII 6.103: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 103. (A.R. No. 146 of 1897). ON A PILLAR TO THE LEFT OF THE DHVAJASTAMBHA IN THE SAME TEMPLE. At the top are cut figures of a crescent, peacock and sun.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīnārīpatinābhipaṁkkajabhava
śrīpādajātōttamakṣmānāthāṁbu
jabhāskaruṁḍḍu nijavaṁśaṁ bella(ṁ)
dīpiṁppa(ṁ)gā dīnānāthakavīṁdragāya
kulu gīrttiṁppaṁggaṁ gīrttīśu(ṁ)ḍai
bhūnāthāgraṇi buddhavarmma prabhatōṁ buṭṭe
nnahāśauryyu(ṁ)ḍai . śrīramyakṣmāva
dhūkāṁccikinenayagu kāṁccīpurīnāthu nu
ggrākārunu lālāṭanētruṁ ggavijana
hitu mukkaṁṭikāḍveṭṭi(ṁ)buṇyācāruṁ
ddadbuddhavarmmēśvaru(ṁ)ḍu golici
munuśāsanaṁ bboṁdda(ṁ) garnnōdāruṁ
ḍōṁgēṟumārggattrayamu vaḍa
se nātāracaṁddrārkkalīlanu . Ā vibhu
nanvayaṁbbuna guṇāḍyu(ṁ)ḍu gaṁḍḍa(ṁ)ḍu
vuṭṭe vānikini dēvamahījadāni A
gu dēsaṭi paṁḍḍa(ṁ)ḍu vuṭṭi ṣaṭsaha
ssrāvani Ēleṁ datsutu(ṁ) ḍudaggru(ṁ)
ḍu villamabhīma(ṁ) ḍaṁdhralakṣmīvani
tēśucē(ṁ) baḍase(ṁ) jelvagu paṁcciniku
ṛṟu vrittigānu . Ātanikudbhaviṁcce na
dhipāgraṇi gaṁḍḍa(ṁ)ḍu vānikiṁ ggulastrīti
lakaṁbu mēḍamaku dhīru(ṁ)ḍu vaṁḍḍa(ṁ)
ḍu vuṭṭe vānikini śītakarāsya būramaku
sindhuravairibaluṁḍḍu rājamāndhātu(ṁ)
ḍu vuṭṭe bhīma(ṁ)ḍḍu tyuṁḍu dhanyu(ṁ)
ḍu puṇyamūrtti rōdhibhīma
ggulāṁ

dīdhitirēkhavarēṇya
puṇyadōhala Anaṁ
beṁppuganna Eṟiyā
ṁbbaku nudbhava ma
yye bhāratīnila
yu(ṁ)ḍanaṁgga(ṁ) ba
ṁḍḍadharaṇīpati sa
rvvakalāppravīṇu(ṁ)ḍai .
tala(ṁ)pu sadartthabhā
vamuna(ṁ) dadgatasū
ktula(ṁ) gūḍavarnnana
lu golasugonaṁgga
vrāvaḍlugōrinabhaṁ
ggika vaccimuṭṭaṁ
gōmalagati dēsi
mārggamulu maṭṭu
paḍaṁggaṭanaṁbbu
loppa nādyulakri
ya(ṁ)jeppanercce
nṛpadhūrjjaṭi bhīma
yapaṁḍḍa(ṁ) ḍimmahini .

svaratarkkāṁbaracaṁddrasaṁkhya(ṁ)ja
nutacchākābdacaittrāmalētarapa
ṁccādaśi saurivāsarasamudyanmēṣa
saṁkrāṁtti susthirataṁbbōlucu mayū
ravāhanunakuṁ jjēṁbrōla(ṁ) beṭṭiṁ
cce bhāsvaradīpaṁ bbatibhakti(ṁ) baṁḍḍa
nripu(ṁ) ḍācaṁddrārkkatāraṁbugānu .
svasti . śakavarṣaṁbulu 1067 gu
nēṁṭṭi caittra bahala paṁccādaThe letterda is written below the line.śiyu
śanaiścaravāramuna śrīkumāra
svāmidēvaraku mahāmaṇḍalēśvara pa
ṁḍḍaya dama taṁḍri bhīmarājunaku
darmmārtthamugā nakhaṁḍḍadīpamuna
kiccina Eḍlu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni nalla
ṁgāṭabōyuni koḍuku koṇḍabōyuṇḍu
dana puttrānupauttrika mācaṁddrārkkamu
mahāsēnamuna nitya māneṁḍu neyu
vōyaṁgalavāṇḍu . śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
